title: ziziphora taurica subsp. cleonioides
intro: Ziziphora taurica subsp. cleonioides, also known as cleonic mint or mountain balm, is a subspecies of the Ziziphora taurica plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which help alleviate digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ziziphora taurica subsp. cleonioides include its ability to soothe headaches, relieve nausea, and reduce stress and anxiety, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
